sections.title: Carbs
sections.narration: 10.6g of carbs. and that is basically the whole nutrition story.
sections.subtitleText: 10.6g of carbs. and that is basically the whole nutrition story.

sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: the upsides first: very available and cheap because that is about the only practical argument it has. use case can matter more than macros because this category is really about function and trade-offs. sometimes makes sense in a narrow use case because context matters more here than raw nutrient purity.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: on the weaker side: liquid sugar is a brutal downside because this is almost the exact kind of misc item the category should bury. basically no useful nutrition because it gives up nutritional value while still costing calories. easy to oversell beyond what the numbers support because misc items often attract exaggerated narratives.

closing.summary: Regular Cola does have a few real-world upsides. but the nutrition case is still weak and the downsides drag it down hard. best treated as an occasional context item, not a nutritional base.
